name: 1'4"x2'4" Geometric Blob Rectangular Outdoor Doormat - Room Essentials™
description:
Add an inviting look to your entryway with this Floral Silhouette Rectangular Outdoor Doormat from Room Essentials™. This rectangular medium-pile doormat is crafted from 100% coir material to remove dirt and debris from shoes at the door, while the latex backing helps keep it securely in place. Perfect for everyday use, it features print of various geometric blobs in multicolors on a natural brown background, creating a warm and welcoming entryway.

Room Essentials™: Everyday Value
